runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at this track behind Creeping Tiger beaten 3.5 lengths (23.34). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at this track behind Creeping Tiger beaten 3.5 lengths (23.34). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.53) when eighth over 520m at Wentworth Park in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and four places from six starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (30.24) over 520m at this track. Has a low draw and can measure up.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 15 lengths (30.45) behind Pound Keeping in a Maiden on April 11. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 15 lengths (30.45) behind Pound Keeping in a Maiden on April 11. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when he won comfortably by 4 lengths at Gosford (29.48) beating Latest Twist in a Grade 5 on April 7. Can continue the winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when he won comfortably by 4 lengths at Gosford (29.48) beating Latest Twist in a Grade 5 on April 7. Can continue the winning form.

runners.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Wentworth Park over 520m. Not keen this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Wentworth Park over 520m. Not keen this time.

runners.formComment: Was a winner three back at Nowra then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (30.01) at Wentworth Park. Has ability but will need everything to go right.

runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (30.43) at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Will need plenty of luck.

runners.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished last over 400m at Maitland beaten 13 lengths (23.27) behind Zipping Daly in a Grade 5 on February 23. Hard to entertain this time.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 515m at Gosford, beaten 9 lengths. Prepared to just watch this time.
